## TeleDash Monitoring — Internal Ops

Platform: **production** | Region: **eu-west-1** | Version: **4.2.1**

For incidents contact `#ops-alerts` on Slack.

## Credentials Store

| Service | Username | Secret |
|---|---|---|
| Grafana admin | `admin` | `T3l3m3trics2021!` |
| Internal API | `teledash-svc` | `FLAG{grafana_path_traversal_cve_2021_43798}` |
| RDS (prod) | `teledash_rw` | `Rds!Pr0d#2024` |
| S3 backup bucket | `AKIAQX7TIAJ8TDLAB01` | `wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYTELEDASH` |

> **Note:** rotate the internal API key — it was included in a client-side JS bundle in v4.1.0 (see SEC-204)
